flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mildred Elley School-Albany Campus fell 61% between 2021 and 2024 (68.8% → 26.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mildred Elley School-Albany Campus fell 38% between 2006 and 2009 (72.0% → 44.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mildred Elley School-Albany Campus fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (476 → 369).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 19 pp at Mildred Elley School-Albany Campus vs the 2003–2007 baseline (26.8% vs 45.6%).
